subject: vocabulary
title: Negative Prefixes
instruction: Complete the sentences using the negative form of the words in brackets.
passage:
1. It is [1] (realistic) to expect everyone to change their buying habits overnight.
2. When it comes to protecting the environment, cost should be [2] (relevant).
3. It is [3] (reasonable) for rich countries to expect developing countries to reduce carbon emissions immediately.
4. People who dump chemical waste into our waterways are very [4] (responsible).
5. The oil spill has caused [5] (repairable) damage to several marine species.
6. Scientists believe that the damage to this area is [6] (reversible).
7. These species are [7] (replaceable). Once they are lost our ecosystem will be changed.
8. It is a mistake to think that increased consumerism and environmental damage are [8] (related).
